name: meta-marketing-plugin
description: Meta Marketing MCP bundle with builder, consultant, morning review, and ad copy writer workflows for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Publish, review, and diagnose Meta ads with saved site profiles.
interface.longDescription: Bundles Meta Marketing MCP workflows for Codex with profile-aware builder, consultant, morning review, and an ad-copy subagent workflow.
defaultPrompt: Publish a paused Meta ad from an image for the selected site profile.
Review yesterday's Meta performance and give actions.
Diagnose a weak Meta campaign and suggest fixes.
